nodes.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
nodes.summary: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Pelzeln's tody-tyrant、Black-capped pygmy tyrant、Straneck's tyrannulet等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Junín canastero
nodes.summary: Junín canastero（Junín canastero，学名 Asthenes virgata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于康乃爾鳥類學實驗室，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are scattered sightings between these two population centers. The Junin canastero primarily inhabits humid landscapes with tall bunch grass, sometimes those with scattered bushes and near stands of polylepis

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "This canastero potentially is vulnerable to habitat loss or degradation, such as through overgrazing."
